channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Data centers become the face of AI backlash
item.description: Only a small fraction of data center opponents live near one, according to new polling by a firm that advises leading AI labs.

item.title: Axios-Ipsos poll: Health affordability is shaping the midterms
item.description: Data: Axios-Ipsos; Note: Margin of error is +/-2.9 percentage points; Chart: Caitlin Owens/Axios Majorities of Americans say they're more likely to vo...

item.title: Nvidia says AI's water challenge is largely solved
item.description: A top Nvidia executive says water concerns surrounding data centers could be largely addressed by the company's next generation of AI infrastructure. ...

item.title: Trump's messy path to peace
item.description: Last Wednesday, the U.S. and Iran signed a deal to end the war. Since then, Iran said it was closing the Strait of Hormuz again (though it didn't in p...
